title: Fuel prices up ₹7.5 in 10 days after fourth hike by ₹2.8 per litre
description: Petrol crosses ₹100/litre mark in Delhi after four years; Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman says government to take ₹1 lakh crore revenue hit for reducing Central excise duty on petrol and diesel by ₹10 a litre
